title: Mark a shared-mode module async: false
prompt: A test module at `test/my_app/integration/full_stack_test.exs` needs to use `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox.mode(MyApp.Repo, {:shared, self()})` because it spans a Registry process that can't accept allowances. Write the opening of the module: declare `use MyApp.DataCase, async: false` (NOT async: true), and add a single-line comment explaining why.
tier_rationale: Direct application of the 'shared mode requires async: false' rule.
research_citation: "If a test sets the Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox to :shared mode, never run it asynchronously" — AppSignal
